theorem_statement: On the live charged corpus there is no theorem-grade end-to-end closure. The current same-carrier chain emits only the centered charged shape modulo common shift; the latent operator C_hat_e^{cand} remains undeclared because oph_generation_bundle_branch_generator_splitting is still open; and even the minimal central-split transfer extension would only promote theorem-grade centered operator data, not the affine-covariant absolute anchor A_ch. Therefore no theorem-grade g_e, Delta_e_abs, or charged masses are emitted on the current corpus.
